data.title: BitMart Market Report: BTC is expected to continue to fluctuate in the short term
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to BitMart's market report on April 17, the total market value of the cryptocurrency market is 2.64 trillion US dollars, down 0.16% from the previous day. BTC fluctuated within a narrow range during the day, and the BTC ETF had a large outflow of 170 million US dollars yesterday. It is expected that BTC will continue to fluctuate in the short term; ETH is also in a narrow range of fluctuations; the comprehensive long-short ratio is 1.002, and the bullish force is at a 24-hour high; altcoins generally fell, and market funds have less interest in tokens with a market value of more than 100 million US dollars, and more hype is being made on altcoins with a market value of tens of millions of dollars.

data.title: Ethereum fees drop to five-year low as transaction volume falls
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the on-chain analysis platform Santiment, transaction costs on the Ethereum network have fallen to their lowest level in five years as activity on the blockchain is at a low point. Brian Quinlivan, marketing director of Santiment, said that the Ethereum network fee is currently about $0.168 per transaction. As fees decrease, the number of people sending ETH and interacting with smart contracts has also decreased. When many people use Ethereum, users bid higher fees to get their transactions confirmed faster, which pushes up the average cost, and when the number of transactions decreases, users do not need to bid too high fees. Therefore, the average fee will fall. This is essentially a supply and demand system. Quinlivan analyzed that from a trading perspective, low fees may hinder price rebounds; however, traders seem to be patiently waiting for the global economic uncertainty to pass before increasing the frequency of Ethereum and altcoin transactions. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 1,600 USDT with a 1.90% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 17, 2025, 05:40 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 1,600 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,601.26001 USDT, with a narrowed 1.90% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: VanEck to Launch New Crypto-Related ETF NODE in May
data.description: According to Foresight News, VanEck is set to introduce a new crypto-related exchange-traded fund (ETF) named NODE on May 14. The ETF will focus on investing in 30 to 60 stocks linked to the digital asset economy. Additionally, it will include investments in cryptocurrency exchanges, Bitcoin mining companies, and data centers.

data.title: a16z Urges SEC to Update Crypto Custody Rules for Advisors
data.description: According to Foresight News, a16z has called on the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to revise the crypto custody regulations for registered investment advisors. In a formal letter submitted to the SEC's crypto working group, a16z emphasized that registered investment advisors should be permitted to directly hold cryptocurrency assets under specific conditions and within clearly defined safeguards. The firm suggested that the commission should offer new guidance to facilitate crypto asset custody arrangements, even if only as an interim measure before new rules are established.

data.title: Planet Lunch News
2 new wallet addresses received 115,000 AAVE and 818,000 UNI from Cumberland
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Spot on Chain monitoring, in the past 35 hours, two new wallets received 115,719 AAVE (approximately US$15.83 million) and 818,474 UNI (approximately US$4.28 million) from Cumberland.

data.title: Significant Transfer of AAVE and UNI Tokens Observed
data.description: According to Foresight News, Spot On Chain has reported that two new addresses received substantial transfers from Cumberland within the last 35 hours. The transactions included 115,719 AAVE tokens, valued at approximately $15.83 million, and 818,474 UNI tokens, worth around $4.28 million.

data.title: R2 stablecoin testnet is officially launched, and the mainnet is expected to be released in Q2
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News RWA stablecoin yield protocol R2 announced today that its testnet has been officially launched. Users can receive test tokens through Discord, mint R2USD and stake, participate in product interactions such as R2BTC and R2ETH, and complete tasks on platforms such as Galxe and Intract to earn testnet points Signals and Pulses. All points will be exchanged for R2 tokens according to the rules before the mainnet TGE.
Officials said that more test networks will be supported in the next two weeks to connect the multi-chain ecosystem and provide users with a wider range of participation paths and choices.
R2 aims to build the next generation of redeemable, real-income stablecoin protocols, with underlying assets covering on-chain US bonds, compliant MMF strategies, real estate rents, etc. The mainnet is expected to be officially launched in the second quarter of 2025.

data.title: LBank’s online token DEFIANT has risen above 0.02USDT. Since its launch on LBank, the maximum increase has reached 221%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: LBank market data shows: LBank's online token DEFIANT rose above 0.02USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.0225USDT. The current price is 0.01872USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 173%. Since the launch of LBank, the maximum increase has reached 221%, and the current market value is approximately 18.72 million US dollars.
